Team —

Quick background: Cloudstream is targeting a May 10 public launch for a major feature that depends on our multi-model routing (MMR) to orchestrate embeddings + retrieval + generator pipelines. We certificated a compatibility shim but the product team needs a few weeks beyond their original timeline to deliver the native MMR support (DEPLOY-834). Cloudstream is telling us the launch cannot proceed without the native behavior because performance/latency regressions with the shim break UX.

Following our renewal call this morning, I wanted to put a simple proposed approach for the committed spend prepay and the drawdown schedule. High level:

- We establish four milestone release buckets (Q2/Q3/Q4/Q1) for drawdowns; each bucket can be consumed monthly by your engineers and we will allocate credits against usage.

Subject: Spikes in latency + 5xx errors on reserved pool (VortexPay)

Alex —

We started seeing elevated tail latency and a rising 5xx rate on our production endpoints served from the reserved pool around 15:10 PST. Over the last two hours:

- P95 latency jumped from ~120ms to 420–700ms for several routes.
- 5xx rate climbed to ~4.8% (normally <0.3%).
- Throughput appears limited: token throughput dropped by ~22% vs baseline.

I've attached a short CSV with request samples and a small trace. We have a customer call Monday and this is blocking critical flows — requesting immediate help.

We are on the plan D-9134 (reserved set), so this is hitting production SLA.

Can someone from Redwood ops triage urgently?

Thanks,
Elena
Lead SRE, VortexPay

Following the call this morning with AcmeCo and Carlos from AWS, I sketched a lightweight banding approach we can use across private offers to accelerate buyer approvals and co-sell activation. Attached: po_banding_matrix_v1.xlsx and a short activation playbook draft.

Key proposal (high-level):
- Band A: <$100k ARR equivalent, auto-approval via Seller Ops + one finance item (invoice cadence).
- Band B: $100k–$500k, requires seller manager + finance quick review (24–48h) and AWS partner signoff for co-sell.
- Band C: >$500k, full procurement evidence pack + legal/finance signoff and DocuSign.
